text: By January 2025 Romanian authorities tightened campaign-finance scrutiny especially for online platforms and moved to bar Georgescu from standing in the re-run election scheduled for May 2025 citing his campaign's central role in the manipulated TikTok network. EU institutions continued investigating TikTok under the DSA while disinformation researchers and civil-society groups called for improved monitoring and transparency before the new vote. The Romanian case was increasingly cited globally as a precedent for electoral annulment based on social media interference.
